displayAddress: Unit 10 High Walk, The Wellington Centre, Aldershot, GU11 1DB
detailedDescription: The Wellington Centre consists of a shopping centre, seven floor office block and a 470 space multi storey car park all occupying a prime location within Aldershot town centre. With over fifty retailers this multi level shopping centre has a wide range of well known stores. The onsite car park has lift access directly into the shopping malls during normal opening hours. Tenants include Argos, Boots, WH Smith, Wilkinsons, New Look, Mothercare, JD Sports, Peacocks, Greggs, Lidl, Wimpey and Sports Direct Aldershot is a popular Hampshire commuter town, 17 miles east of Basingstoke, 8 miles south of Camberley and 11 miles west of Guildford, with a population of c.36,000. The town is served by its own mainline railway station and there is easy access to major road and motorway networks. The Wellington Centre benefits from an adjoining multi-storey car park which boasts c.430 spaces accommodating the Centre’s average footfall of approximately 88,000 per week. To Let £14,000 per annum exclusive of all other occupational costs. A new effectively FRI lease for a term of 10 years.
